writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: Finance journals value clear economic intuition. Lead with the economic question, then formalize. Double-spaced submission.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Panels labeled (a), (b). Use time-series plots, cross-sectional sorts, or coefficient plots.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Standard finance table format: panel structure, t-statistics in parentheses, significance stars.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Full proofs in appendix. Main text should contain proposition statements and economic intuition.
writing_guidelines.related_work_placement: Separate literature review section after introduction.

common_pitfalls: Not leading with the economic question (jumping to methodology too quickly)
Tables without t-statistics or standard errors
